component.name: Vortex
component.summary: Download videos and music from the web

description.p: Vortex is a native GNOME application for downloading videos and music from YouTube, SoundCloud, and hundreds of other sites — powered by yt-dlp.

ul.li: Paste any URL and preview title, thumbnail, and duration
Choose video quality or extract audio in MP3, M4A, FLAC, or Opus
Live progress bar with speed and ETA
Persistent settings: download folder, speed limit, browser cookies
